seo.title: AshTech
seo.description: AshTech Software Solutions builds AI tools, mobile apps, websites, Web3 products, robotics software, and e-commerce platforms.

hero.subtitle: AI tools. Web apps. Mobile. Web3. E-commerce. Interactive portfolios. Real software, built by real developers.

about.title: About AshTech
about.p1: AshTech Software Solutions is a technology company built on one principle - great software changes everything.
about.p2: We specialize in varied domains including AI-powered systems, mobile applications, Web3/Blockchain ecosystems, robotics software, and comprehensive E-commerce platforms.
about.p3: We do not just write code. We architect systems, design experiences, and build agentic AI workflows and products that are fast, scalable, and ready for the real world.
about.p4: From Kerala, India — we build technology with a global outlook, proudly serving clients across India and the MENA region.

portfolio.title: Portfolio Websites
portfolio.desc: Custom portfolio websites with clean design and strong performance.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce Platforms
ecommerce.desc: Scalable online stores with secure checkout and product management.

interactive.title: Interactive Websites
interactive.desc: Immersive, motion-rich web experiences for modern brands.

ai.title: AI Tools & Agentic Workflows
ai.desc: Practical AI features, assistants, and AI-agentic workflows integrated into real products.

mobile.title: Mobile Apps
mobile.desc: Android and cross-platform apps built for reliability and speed.

web3.title: Web3 Solutions
web3.desc: Blockchain-backed products, smart integrations, and decentralized systems.

robotics.title: Robotics Software
robotics.desc: Control systems and software logic for robotics-driven workflows.

uiux.title: UI/UX Design
uiux.desc: Product-first interfaces focused on clarity, usability, and conversion.

founder.title: Behind AshTech
founder.p1: Ashfaaq KT is a software engineer from Kerala, India, specializing in AI-integrated full-stack development. He founded AshTech to bridge the gap between complex engineering and accessible, world-class digital products for global clients.
founder.quote: I founded AshTech with a simple passion: to make world-class technology accessible to everyone. By leveraging AI, we’ve reimagined development to be simpler, faster, and more transparent, allowing visionary ideas to come to life effortlessly.

comingSoon.title: We're Baking Something Saucey
comingSoon.intro: The AshTech glow-up is real. Soon, you'll be able to:
comingSoon.item1: Secure the bag by requesting your project directly
comingSoon.item2: Track the grind in real-time from start to finish
comingSoon.item3: Get live updates while we're in the lab cooking
comingSoon.item4: Direct line to the devs—no gatekeeping allowed
comingSoon.tagline: Main character energy. No cap. Full transparency.
comingSoon.success: You're officially on the roster! Stay winning.

step1.title: 1. Sign In & Connect
step1.desc: Apply for your project seamlessly. Browse curated lists of AshTech developers with transparent hourly rates or fixed quotes.

step2.title: 2. Select & Confirm
step2.desc: Handpick your dedicated developer. Receive officially recorded kickoff confirmations via SMS and Email.

step3.title: 3. Live Tracking
step3.desc: Watch your product come to life in real-time. Monitor delivery dates and securely inject live comments during development.

step4.title: 4. Transparent Billing
step4.desc: No hidden fees. Review crystal-clear breakdowns of API costs, database expenses, and developer time.

step5.title: 5. Delivery & Review
step5.desc: Receive the complete, polished project folder and raw source code. Deploy, evaluate, and scale your business.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Project requests, collaborations, or just a hello - reach out and we will get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: Thanks! We have received your message and will get back to you shortly.

footer.desc: AshTech Software Solutions builds AI, web, mobile, Web3, and robotics products with a clean monochrome identity and bold execution.

chatbot.title: AshTech AI
chatbot.welcome: Hi, I am AshTech AI. Ask me about our services, projects, or founder.
chatbot.restricted: I am specialized in AshTech topics. Ask me about our services, projects, or founder!
